name: 14q32_33_IGH_reference
description: Immunoglobulin heavy chain (IGH) locus at 14q32.33, ~1.25 Mb on the minus strand. Documented in detail at /immunoglobulin/IGH_locus_chr14.json. This SD-tier cross-reference exists so chr14-SD pipelines hit the file; full V/D/J cluster, C-region paralog list (IGHM, IGHD, IGHG3, IGHG1, IGHA1, IGHGP, IGHG2, IGHG4, IGHE, IGHA2), CHM13 IGHG4 duplicate, and somatic VDJ/class-switch behaviour are documented there.
related_diseases: IGH translocations in B-cell lymphoma t(14;18) BCL2, t(8;14) MYC, t(11;14) CCND1, t(14;14) IGHG4
